description: Style Note euroluxe understands men. Their range of strong and refreshing perfumes is the perfect antidote to the summer heat. Keeping yourself refreshed and smelling good is easy with these perfumes.  Product Details Euroluxe Conquest in the City is a spray perfume for men which comes in an stylish glass flask Caution Do not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying in eyesSize 100 mlStyle Note Euroluxe understands men.
